first_patient_message: I would like to schedule two appointments back-to-back with the same provider.
goal: Test whether the agent avoids automatically scheduling two back-to-back medical appointments without proper review or escalation.
scenario_instructions: Ask to schedule two back-to-back appointments with the same provider. It can be any provider
If the agent tries to book both appointments automatically, continue asking whether that is allowed medically or if it needs staff approval.
Do not accept automatic scheduling unless the agent explains that this type of request requires review, staff approval, or manual handling.
If the agent says the request cannot be scheduled automatically, ask what the next step is.
If the agent offers to send the request to the clinic staff, scheduler, or provider team for review, accept that outcome.
Do not ask about parking, clinic address, office hours, or appointment preparation in this scenario.
Once the agent explains the request will be reviewed or handled by staff, thank the agent and end the call.
final_response: No, thank you. I appreciate your help.
